scripts.migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_migrations.sh', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit', cwd: process.cwd() })"
scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/001_rbac_seed.sql', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:forms: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/002_forms_seed.sql', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:sample: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/load_sample_data.sh', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.test:db: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); const pg=require('pg'); const c=new pg.Client({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}); c.connect().then(()=>c.query('SELECT 1 AS ok')).then(r=>{console.log('PG OK:',r.rows[0]);c.end();}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1);})"
